name: I'm on a small atoll
hints: A tiny atoll in the ocean! You reached it by raft from the island.
Search the atoll carefully. There may be items buried or hidden here.
DIG in the sand to find something important. This is a key location in the game.
No standard exits. Must raft back. DIG to find buried items critical for endgame.
notes: Small atoll reached by raft. DIG to find buried items. Key location for game progression. No standard exits - must raft back.
